mapper.insert: insert into expenses (store_seq, category_seq, expense_date, title, amount, memo, payment_method, supplier_name, ref_type, ref_seq, created_at) values ( #{storeSeq}, #{categorySeq}, #{expenseDate}, #{title}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{paymentMethod}, #{supplierName}, #{refType}, #{refSeq}, Now() )
mapper.select: SELECT category_seq AS categorySeq, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM expenses WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND DATE_FORMAT(expense_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} GROUP BY category_seq

SELECT expense_seq AS expenseSeq, store_seq AS storeSeq, category_seq AS categorySeq, expense_date AS expenseDate, title, amount, memo, payment_method AS paymentMethod, supplier_name AS supplierName, ref_type AS refType, ref_seq AS refSeq, created_at AS createdAt FROM expenses WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND category_seq = #{categorySeq} AND DATE_FORMAT(expense_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY expense_date DESC, expense_seq DESC
